nasb.text: Then Manoah arose and followed his wife, and when he came to the man he said to him, “Are you the man who spoke to the woman?” And he said, “I am.”

esv.text: And Manoah arose and went after his wife and came to the man and said to him, “Are you the man who spoke to this woman?” And he said, “I am.”

cnv.text: 瑪挪亞起來，跟著他的妻子出去，來到那人跟前，問他：“你就是向這個婦人說過話的人嗎？”他回答：“我就是。”

ccb.text: 玛挪亚立刻跟随妻子来到那人面前，问他：“那天跟我妻子说话的就是你吗？”他答道：“是我。”
